body.title: Resize Postgres connection pool: minconn=1→3, maxconn=10→20
body.result: minconn=1→3, maxconn=10→20 in db_proxy.py. 1684 tests pass. Committed e04d8a61.
body.description: cortex.py ThreadedConnectionPool(minconn=1, maxconn=10) under-provisions for NE cycles + multiple async jobs contending. At pool exhaustion new requests block. Fix: raise minconn=3, maxconn=20; add pool starvation metrics to get_metrics() output (track getconn() wait time). DB finding from deep-audit Panel 1.
